segments.text: The Setup Wizard activates your workspace in about five minutes. First, enter your A B N — we auto-hydrate your company details straight from the Australian Business Register.
Next, upload your logo and set your brand colours, so every report and invoice you send out looks like yours.
Choose your pricing tier — Standard, Premium, or Enterprise.
Connect your accounting software — Xero, MYOB, QuickBooks, ServiceM8, or Ascora.
Run Workspace Health to verify every check is green.
Then click Activate. You're ready to start inspections.
